column11:
Thank you for participating! We are researching human speech production.
What you’ll do: You will read a short description of an AI process and answer 3 questions about how you speak.
Time: This should take less than 3 minutes.
Privacy: Your responses are completely anonymous. No personal data is collected.
Rights: You can stop the survey at any time.
By clicking "I agree" below, you confirm that you are a student and you consent to your anonymous data being used for this research project.
Question: Do you agree to participate?
